contacts.title: Luna Vox Breach
contacts.objective_update: Breach Luna corridor and hold the relay approach.

lines.speaker: Bridge Vox
lines.text: Boarding craft on converging vectors. Luna corridor is collapsing.

lines.speaker: Death Guard Captain
lines.text: Hold this deck. The warning reaches Terra or we die at the relay.

lines.speaker: Bridge Vox
lines.text: Acknowledged. Bulkhead locks disengaging for counter-board action.
